title: Open your Interactive Brokers account by Sep 13 at noon
content:
Please open your Interactive Brokers Paper Trading Account by tomorrow, Sept 13 at noon. 

The link to open your account is below:

https://ndcdyn.interactivebrokers.com/Universal/Application?type=DEMO&code=TRADING_LAB_DIN671877 Links to an external site.

 

Let me know if you have any questions,

iulian
